attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.DISCOUNT_TAKEN, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.EXCHANGE_DATE, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.EXCHANGE_RATE, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.INVOICE_BASE_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.PAYMENT_BASE_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.CASH_JE_BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.FUTURE_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.FUTURE_PAY_POSTED_FLAG, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.JE_BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ELECTRONIC_TRANSFER_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.ASSETS_ADDITION_FLAG, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.INVOICE_PAYMENT_TYPE, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.OTHER_INVOICE_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.MRC_GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.MRC_INVOICE_BASE_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE_ID, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS  STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS,
 (
 select INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS
 minus
 select INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID = STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL)
